style_effects: Gentle water droplets cling to Hitmonlee's limbs, slowly drifting upward like suspended pearls; translucent bubbles rise in soft spirals around its body, reflecting the gentle glow of a moonlit ocean. A soft blue aura pulses gently from its pores, casting a cool luminescence that illuminates the surrounding mist with a serene, reflective quality. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
